- [networks](https://docs.spasm.network):

More networks will be added in the future.

items.title: Spasm is the endgame of social media
items.summary: In the latest video, we compare Spasm against other decentralized social media solutions to prove why it represents the most advanced generation with superior agnostic architecture that cements its status as the endgame of social media.
items.description:
In the latest video, we compare Spasm against other decentralized social media solutions to prove why it represents the most advanced generation with superior agnostic architecture that cements its status as the endgame of social media.

If you're sick of slave tech's walled gardens, obsolete tech, and closed ecosystems, then welcome to Spasm - the true land of the free.

You can find your [tribe](https://spasm.network/tribes) or unplug your community from slave tech by [launching](https://spasm.network/run) your own Spasm instance in minutes with Docker/Podman or a single script, which handles complete server setup, necessary hardening, and enables auto-updates, so you won't have to worry about server maintenance. Additionally, you will qualify for a fat airdrop for running an instance in accordance with the [ecosystem growth initiative](https://forum.spasm.network/news/spasmid014a93c8cdae1d241329ce59d6f3c7a1ea160e320e267af3f05d9690f84edb1864).

You can also integrate Spasm into your project using the [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/spasm.js), which includes many useful utils to simplify the development process.

Unable to run a Spasm instance? Share this post with your tech-savvy friend or [fund the resistance](https://docs.spasm.network/donate). Spasm has been in development for half a decade without any VC money, grants, or other external funding, so any amount will help grow the ecosystem.

Alternatively, you can support the ecosystem by scooping up some SPASM from [Uniswap](https://app.uniswap.org/explore/tokens/ethereum/0x33333470b917fe3e669e1646b96990aa369e3333).

Spasm equips you with the best cypherpunk tools to escape walled gardens and reclaim your right to the freedoms of association and speech.

Join the resistance at [spasm.network](https://forum.spasm.network)

items.title: Operation Fuck Slave Tech: Join the Resistance
items.summary: We're starting a massive push for adoption. The operation is codenamed "Fuck slave tech". This is a crucial moment for freedom tech, so we need your help more than ever.
items.description:
Regulators continue tightening their grip on slave tech platforms, imposing dystopian rules far beyond anything we could have imagined during the covid-era crackdowns on our freedoms. While most law-abiding tax-paying slaves will comply with all sorts of restrictions, including full KYC and other age verification bullshit, a lot of free minds will be leaving slave tech's walled gardens soon. Thus, we must ensure that Spasm is ready to receive them, otherwise people will flock to outdated closed ecosystems like Mastodon, Farcaster, Lens, Bluesky, etc.

All the core pieces are in place: we now have a reworked web admin panel to make administration of Spasm instances very easy, a Docker/Podman deployment that takes just a few minutes to launch, and an automated one-script full server setup with Ansible that runs autonomously without human intervention.

In other words, deploying Spasm is now a "one-click-and-forget" experience. Additionally, running an instance qualifies you for a [fat airdrop](https://forum.spasm.network/news/spasmid014a93c8cdae1d241329ce5).

Launch Spasm under three minutes with Docker/Podman:

[Forgejo](https://git.spasm.network/spasm-network/spasm-docker) [Codeberg](https://codeberg.org/spasm-network/spasm-docker) [Github](https://github.com/spasm-network/spasm-docker)

Deploy Spasm on a new VPS with one script:

[Forgejo](https://git.spasm.network/spasm-network/spasm-ansible) [Codeberg](https://codeberg.org/spasm-network/spasm-ansible) [Github](https://github.com/spasm-network/spasm-ansible)

![image](https://media.spasm.network/spasmim0155702e8de9c7de5a1cae82cf5f782842654f52424342a8a4b8d87991d629a19e.jpeg)

### Fuck slave tech

We're starting a massive push for adoption. The operation is codenamed "Fuck slave tech". This is a crucial moment for freedom tech, so we need your help more than ever.

Unable to run a Spasm instance? Share this post with your tech-savvy friend or fund the resistance.

Spasm has been in development for half a decade without any VC money, grants, or other external funding, so any amount will help grow the ecosystem.

We also have new instances joining the network recently, so [find your tribe](https://spasm.network/tribes) and unplug yourself from slave tech.

items.title: Spasm Ecosystem Growth Initiative
items.summary: We're starting a massive push for adoption. The operation is codenamed "Fuck slave tech". This is a crucial moment for freedom tech, so we need your help more than ever.
items.description:
The Spasm incentive program aims to foster ecosystem expansion and distribute SPASM tokens among degens and cypherpunks.

In the first round, 10% of the total SPASM supply is up for grabs, rewarding the next 72 communities to join the future of social media.

The first eight communities get 0.4% of SPASM each, the next eight get 0.3%, then 0.2%, and 0.1%. Finally, forty more communities will receive 0.05% each.

Tokens are vested to prevent a quick sell-off. A community can run multiple forums, but it will only qualify for one airdrop to prevent Sybil attacks.

If you run an instance without a community or you have a large community wanting to get better allocation, hit us up on Session to talk.

If you're a developer, researcher, cypherpunk or a freedom seeker, join us on Spasm or Session. Let's talk.

---

### Let there be SPASM!

**0x33333470b917fe3e669e1646b96990aa369e3333**

[Website](https://spasm.network) [Etherscan](https://etherscan.io/token/0x33333470b917fe3e669e1646b96990aa369e3333) [Uniswap](https://app.uniswap.org/explore/tokens/ethereum/0x33333470b917fe3e669e1646b96990aa369e3333)

items.title: The Uniswap tragedy of fucking up a perfect legacy
items.summary: Each Uniswap protocol is a masterpiece of its time, but Uniswap Labs chose to operate in the most hostile jurisdiction and rely on a centralized infrastructure to run its frontend, which geo-blocks users by IP addresses and employs blockchain surveillance services like BlockAid that operate on a presumption of guilt.
items.description:
Uniswap also uses restrictive Business Source License that legitimizes the bullshit system, which is based on coercion, censorship, law enforcement, absurd concepts like "intellectual property", and it gives more power to the state to decide what information can be shared. Besides, Uniswap enforces anti-free speech laws across the world on behalf of one nation state government.

 In 2020, Uniswap Labs panicked during the SushiSwap vampire attack and printed an unnecessary, inflationary governance token to keep liquidity from fleeing. Predictably, UNI lost 90% from its all-time high during a 2021 altcoin season pump. Only now, five years later, UNI is trying to fix its tokenomics with a burn mechanism to appease bagholders.

To its credit, Uniswap fixed a few issues shortly after the original podcast episode made waves across the crypto space. For example, Uniswap unbanned DPI and many other tokens and removed the "impersonator" flag from the SPASM token.

To learn more about the grim state of web3 and how VC-backed compliant companies are leeching on the Ethereum ecosystem, you can listen to the full episode of Dark Vegas Tales #1: Ethereum runs on slave tech.

And don't be a compliant slave, subscribe with your podcast app using this RSS feed.

Dark Vegas Tales on Spasm, Nostr, and IPFS: darkvegas.eth
